'''Adrell''' was an individual who served as a [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] in the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] between the Empire and the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]]. The Moff operated out of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Manwess III]] in the [[Kilbanis sector/Legends|Kilbanis sector]],<ref name="GG10" /> which was located in the [[Colonies/Legends|Colonies]] region of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].<ref name="Atlas Companion">{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}}</ref> Sometime between [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]] and [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]],<ref name="GG10 note">''[[Galaxy Guide 10: Bounty Hunters]]'', which includes [[Malindin Gevarak]]'s [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] posting, focuses on [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunting]] during the [[Time/Legends|time]] period between the events of [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|''Star Wars'': Episode IV ''A New Hope'']] and [[Star Wars: Episode VI Return of the Jedi|''Star Wars'': Episode VI ''Return of the Jedi'']], which [[The Essential Chronology (real-world book)|''The Essential Chronology'']] places in [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]] and [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]] respectively.</ref> Adrell posted a [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] of 10,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] on the [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Forger (profession)/Legends|counterfeiter]] [[Malindin Gevarak]], who had created counterfeit Imperial currency<ref name="GG10" /> for the Rebel Alliance<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|I|336|Gevarak, Malindin}}</ref> and then fled Imperial authorities. An additional 2,000 credits was offered if Gevarak was captured alive with minimal injury.<ref name="GG10" />

==Behind the scenes==
Adrell was mentioned in the [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] posting for Malindin Gevarak in ''[[Galaxy Guide 10: Bounty Hunters]]'', a supplement released by [[West End Games]] in [[1994]] for ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''. The book was written by [[Rick D. Stuart]] and did not make it clear whether Adrell controlled the entire Kilbanis [[Sector/Legends|sector]] or was simply based there.<ref name="GG10" />
